content:
# How to Create AI-Generated Podcast Intros in 2026

Great podcast intros make a professional first impression. AI makes creating them easy and affordable!

Check out our [[link:/category/Audio|Audio category]] for more tools.

---

## Step 1: Write Your Intro Script

Use [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] to help write your podcast intro script.

**Try Rytr**: {{AFFILIATE_RYTR}}

---

## Step 2: Generate Voiceover

Use [[link:/tools/97|ElevenLabs]] or Murf AI to create a professional voiceover.

### Voiceover Tips
- **Choose a consistent voice**: Keep it the same for every episode
- **Match your brand**: Voice should match your show's personality
- **Keep it short**: Intros should be 10-30 seconds

**Try ElevenLabs**: {{AFFILIATE_ELEVENLABS}}

---

## Step 3: Create Intro Music

Use [[link:/tools/200|Suno]] to generate intro music that fits your podcast.

### Music Tips
- **Keep it short**: 5-15 seconds is perfect
- **Brand fit**: Music should match your show
- **Fade out**: End smoothly

**Try Suno**: https://suno.ai

---

## Step 4: Mix & Edit

Use [[link:/tools/79|Descript]] to combine everything together.

---

## Our Podcast Intro Toolkit

| Step | Tool | Affiliate |
|------|------|-----------|
